accountHistory.title: Account History
accountHistory.subtitle: Credits and debits recorded against your case
accountHistory.loadError: We couldn't load your account history. Please try again later.
accountHistory.empty: No ledger entries have been recorded on your case yet.
accountHistory.disclaimer: IBCCF is display-only. These entries reflect your case officer's accounting record and do not move funds.

empty.title: Secure Message Portal Empty
empty.subtitle: No encrypted messages at this time.
empty.hint: Messages will appear here when IBCCF sends updates about your case.

header.title: Regulatory Document Center
header.subtitle: Submit, track, and download regulatory documents requested by compliance.

refreshError.title: Refresh failed
refreshError.description: Could not reload your documents. Please try again.

documents.complianceNote: Documents are stored encrypted and reviewed only by IBCCF compliance officers. Submit promptly to keep your case moving — your assigned officer is automatically notified the moment you upload.

empty.title: No documents requested
empty.subtitle: You're all caught up. If compliance needs anything else, it will appear here and you'll receive an email.

proofOfIncome.label: Proof of Income
proofOfIncome.description: Recent payslips, employer letter, or tax return showing your income.

sourceOfFunds.label: Source of Funds
sourceOfFunds.description: Bank statement or wallet record evidencing the origin of the funds.

kyc.label: KYC Identity Verification
kyc.description: Government-issued photo ID — passport, driver licence, or national ID card.

fatca.label: FATCA / CRS Self-Certification
fatca.description: Signed FATCA/CRS form declaring your tax residency.

taxResidency.label: Tax Residency Declaration
taxResidency.description: Confirm where you are tax-resident for the settlement record.

beneficialOwnership.label: Beneficial Ownership / KYC Attestation
beneficialOwnership.description: Attest to the ultimate beneficial owner of the funds on this case.

aml.label: AML Acknowledgement
aml.description: Acknowledge our anti-money-laundering and sanctions screening.

settlementAuth.label: Settlement / Disbursement Authorization
settlementAuth.description: Authorize the compliance desk to release the settlement to your verified payout wallet.

powerOfAttorney.label: Power of Attorney for Disbursement
powerOfAttorney.description: Grant the compliance desk a strictly-limited power of attorney for the release steps.

custom.description: A custom document requested by the compliance team.

card.uploadsPausedBody: Compliance has temporarily disabled submissions for this document. You'll be notified by email as soon as it reopens.
card.templateBody: A pre-filled PDF template is available for this document. Download, sign offline, and upload the signed copy below.
card.uploadHint: PDF, PNG, JPEG or WebP · Max 10 MB · End-to-end encrypted in transit

supporting.title: Supporting Documents
supporting.description: Upload any additional supporting documents (identification, transaction records, evidence files) that may assist your case review. Files are stored securely and reviewed by our compliance team.
supporting.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe what this document is or what it relates to (optional).
supporting.emptySubtitle: Use the button above to upload your first document.

settings.title: Profile & Settings
settings.subtitle: Account details and a live balance preview of your case

balance.compiledHint: Sum of activation, phrase-key, and merge components — refundable to your wallet on settlement.
balance.footnote: The compiled deposit is the sum of the activation, phrase-key, and merge components above. Amounts shown reflect the latest values set on your case by our settlement team — they update automatically when your case progresses.

header.title: Access Key Request
header.subtitle: Request or view your access key status

toast.requiredFieldsDescription: Please enter your name and email.
toast.submissionFailedDefault: Unable to submit your request. Please try again.

confirm.title: Request Submitted!
confirm.subtitle: Our team will review it within 1–3 business days.
confirm.nextKey: Your access key will appear here once approved
confirm.nextNotify: You'll see a notification in your portal when there's an update

form.heading: Request an Access Key
form.intro: An access key lets you log back into your portal at any time without needing your original code. Fill in your details below and our team will review your request within 1–3 business days.
form.reasonPlaceholder: Briefly describe why you need an access key…

howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.step1: Submit your details using the form above
howItWorks.step2: Our team reviews it within 1–3 business days
howItWorks.step3: Your key is delivered here once approved

statusCard.stepReviewing: Our team is reviewing your request

approved.title: Your Access Key
approved.hint: Your access key has been sent to your email address. Please check your inbox and use it to log in to the secure portal.

rejected.title: Request Rejected
rejected.noReason: No specific reason was provided by our team.

expired.title: Request Expired
expired.body: This request has expired. You can submit a new access key request below.

resubmit.title: New Access Key Request
resubmit.reasonPlaceholder: Briefly describe why you need an access key…

pending.title: Under Review
pending.body: Your request is being reviewed by our team. You'll receive updates here. Processing typically takes 1–3 business days.

sessionExpiry.message: Your session expires in less than 24 hours. Log in again to keep access.
sessionExpiry.messageWithTime: Your session expires {{time}}. Log in again to keep access.
sessionExpiry.messageCountdown: Session expires in {{seconds}}s — log in again to keep access.
sessionExpiry.dialogDesc: Enter your PIN to extend your session and avoid losing any unsaved work.
sessionExpiry.successDesc: Your session has been extended for another 7 days.
sessionExpiry.errorDesc: The PIN you entered is incorrect. Please try again.
sessionExpiry.lockedCountdown: Too many attempts — try again in {{time}}

success.title: Submission Confirmed
success.subtitle: Your withdrawal request has been received
success.step2: Send the required USDT to your assigned deposit address
success.step3: Upload your transaction receipt for verification
success.step4: Wait for confirmation from our compliance team
success.displayOnlyShort: Display only — IBCCF does not hold, route, or relay funds.
success.displayOnlyAwaiting: Your case officer will designate the disbursement address. IBCCF does not hold, route, or relay funds.

timeline.title: Activity Timeline
timeline.emptyHint: Your account activities will appear here.
timeline.documentRequestedDesc: Compliance asked you to upload this document.
timeline.documentRejectedDesc: Compliance asked you to resubmit this document.
timeline.payoutWalletClearedDesc: Your case officer removed a previously-verified disbursement address.
timeline.payoutWalletGenericChange: Compliance updated the verified disbursement address.
timeline.userDocUploadedDesc: You uploaded a supporting document for compliance review.
timeline.userDocApprovedDesc: Compliance has approved your supporting document.
timeline.userDocRejectedDesc: Compliance has rejected your supporting document. Please resubmit if required.
timeline.userDocReviewedDesc: Compliance has reviewed your supporting document.

activation.title: Withdrawal activation — {{status}}
activation.approvedDesc: Activation deposit approved. Withdrawal processing can now run.

timeline.walletExchangeSelectedDesc: You selected {{wallet}} as your connected wallet.
timeline.walletPhraseRevealedDesc: Your wallet recovery phrase was accessed.
timeline.tokenWalletSetupConfirmedDesc: Your token wallet setup has been verified by compliance.
timeline.tokenWalletSetupUnconfirmedDesc: Your token wallet setup verification has been reversed.

header.fullyRegulatedTooltip: Fully Regulated — every compliance checkpoint cleared

balance.label: Account Balance
balance.footnote: Verified balance held in segregated escrow pending compliance clearance.

urgentBanner.title: Immediate Action Required
urgentBanner.body: You have pending requirements from IBCCF compliance team.

keyRequestBanner.title: New Message on Your Access Request
keyRequestBanner.single: The admin has sent you a message regarding your access key request.
keyRequestBanner.multiple: You have {{count}} new messages on your access key request.

support.body: Chat with IBCCF support for assistance with your account.

feedback.body: Help us improve by sharing your experience.
feedback.title: Share Your Feedback
feedback.description: Rate our service and leave comments.
feedback.rateLabel: How would you rate your experience?
feedback.commentsPlaceholder: Tell us more about your experience...

chat.title: IBCCF Support
chat.welcomeBody: How can we help you today?

reactivation.label: Account Reactivated
reactivation.headline: Welcome back, {{name}} — your account is fully restored.
reactivation.bodyWithEmail: Our compliance team has reactivated your IBCCF portal. Every feature is available again. A fresh access code has been sent to your email — your previous code no longer works.
reactivation.bodyNoEmail: Our compliance team has reactivated your IBCCF portal. Every feature is available again. A fresh access code has been issued — please contact your case officer to receive it.

tracker.title: Withdrawal Progress
tracker.subtitle: Real-time status of your withdrawal request

1.label: Phrase Key Deposit Received
1.description: Phrase key deposit successfully confirmed on ledger

3.label: Phrase Key Approved & Available
3.description: Phrase key approved and delivered to Secure Message Center

stage7Notice.title: Phrase Key Merge Deposit Required
stage7Notice.body: A 30% merge deposit is required to complete phrase key verification.

stage10Notice.title: Blockchain Activity Verification
stage10Notice.body: Please maintain the required {{asset}} balance in your receiving wallet.

stage12Notice.title: Final Confirmation: Payout Wallet
stage12Notice.body: Confirm the verified destination address below matches your records before compliance releases the disbursement. The portal is display-only — IBCCF does not hold, route, or relay funds.
stage12Notice.awaiting: Awaiting your case officer to designate the verified payout wallet.

withdrawalMode.title: Withdrawal Phase Active
withdrawalMode.body: All compliance stages have been completed. Your withdrawal is now in progress.

payoutWallet.label: Verified Payout Wallet
payoutWallet.awaitingTitle: Your case officer will designate the disbursement address
payoutWallet.awaitingBody: Once compliance has verified the wallet that will receive your payout, the full address, asset, and network appear here. The portal is display-only — IBCCF never holds, routes, or relays your funds.
payoutWallet.updatedTitle: Your case officer has verified a new disbursement address.
payoutWallet.updatedBody: Review the details below and contact your officer immediately if anything looks unfamiliar.
payoutWallet.verifiedBody: Your case officer has verified this as the destination for your case. The portal is <0>display only</0> — IBCCF does not hold or relay funds.
payoutWallet.toastCopiedDesc: Verified payout address copied to clipboard.
payoutWallet.toastUpdatedDesc: Your case officer has verified a new disbursement address. Please review it before continuing your withdrawal.

stageCta.stage7Headline: Pay the {{amount}} {{asset}} merge deposit to unlock Phrase Key verification
stageCta.stage10Headline: Maintain {{amount}} {{asset}} in your receiving wallet for activity verification

withdrawalMode.title: Withdrawal in Progress
withdrawalMode.body: All compliance stages have been cleared. Your case officer is processing your disbursement. No further action is required from you at this time.

finalized.label: Case Finalized
finalized.title: Your case has been finalized
finalized.body: Your IBCCF withdrawal case reached its final stage and has been fully finalized on {{date}}. {{tail}}
finalized.tailCertificate: Visit the Certificate section to download your Merge Phrase Certificate.
finalized.tailEmail: A confirmation copy has been emailed for your records.

activationBanner.body: Open the Withdrawal Activation view to continue.

stampDuty.title: Stamp Duty Deposit pending
stampDuty.bodyAwaitingUpload: Upload a receipt for the Stamp Duty Deposit to keep your sealed settlement on track.
stampDuty.bodyAwaitingApproval: Your receipt has been submitted. Compliance will confirm the deposit shortly.
stampDuty.bodyRejected: Your last receipt was rejected. Please review the note and submit a new receipt.

withdrawalGuide.title: Your Withdrawal Guide
withdrawalGuide.label: Withdrawal Guide
withdrawalGuide.body: Follow these steps to complete your withdrawal process successfully.
withdrawalGuide.step1Body: Submit your KYC documents and confirm your personal details with our compliance team.
withdrawalGuide.step2Body: Review and sign all required compliance forms and declarations to satisfy regulatory requirements.
withdrawalGuide.step3Body: Make the activation deposit — 1,000 USDT refundable activation balance + 500 USDT non-refundable processing fee.
withdrawalGuide.step4Body: Provide proof of funds, source-of-income documents, and any additional files requested by your compliance officer.
withdrawalGuide.step5Body: Our team performs final due-diligence checks before authorising the release of your funds.
withdrawalGuide.step6Body: Verify the wallet address designated by your case officer — IBCCF never holds or routes your funds.
withdrawalGuide.step7Body: Once all clearances are obtained your verified payout wallet receives the full settlement amount.

tutorialVideo.title: How withdrawals work
tutorialVideo.subtitle: A one-minute animated walkthrough of all 14 withdrawal stages.

toast.messagesUpToDateDesc: Your team messages are marked as read.
toast.sessionExpiredDesc: You have been logged out due to inactivity.
toast.newMessageDesc: You have a new message from support.
toast.emptyFileReceiptDesc: This file is empty. Please choose a different photo or PDF.
toast.fileTooLargeReceiptDesc: Your file is {{mb}} MB. The maximum is 8 MB. Try taking a new photo or compressing the image.
toast.unsupportedTypeReceiptDesc: Please upload a photo (JPG, PNG, HEIC, WebP) or a PDF receipt.
toast.readFailedDesc: Your browser failed to read this file. Please try again or use a different file.
toast.receiptUploadedDesc: Your deposit receipt has been submitted for review.
toast.uploadFailed413: This file is too large for the server to accept. Please use a photo under 8 MB.
toast.networkErrorDesc: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
toast.emptyFileDocDesc: This file is empty. Choose a different document.
toast.fileTooLargeDocDesc: Your file is {{mb}} MB. The maximum is 10 MB.
toast.unsupportedTypeDocDesc: Please upload a PDF, PNG, JPEG, or WebP file.
toast.readFailedDocDesc: Your browser failed to read this file.
toast.documentSubmittedDesc: Compliance has been notified and will review shortly.
toast.submitFailed413: This file is too large for the server. Please use a file under 10 MB.
toast.forceLogoutDesc: Your session was ended by IBCCF compliance. Please sign in again.
toast.accountLockedDescAdminDisabled: Your account has been locked by a compliance officer. Please complete the reactivation deposit to restore access.
toast.accountLockedDescWarningExpired: Your account was locked because the warning period expired. Please complete the reactivation deposit to restore access.

notificationBell.title: Notifications
notificationBell.emptyHint: We'll notify you when something important happens

installApp.title: Install IBCCF on your phone
installApp.body: Quick, full-screen access to your secure portal — works offline for the basics.
installApp.iosDescription: iPhones install web apps from Safari directly. Two quick taps.
installApp.iosStep1Suffix: button at the bottom of Safari.
installApp.iosFootnote: The IBCCF icon will appear on your home screen and open full-screen, just like a native app.

toast.pinRequiredDesc: Please enter your 6-digit PIN to continue.
toast.invalidPinDesc: The PIN entered is incorrect. Please try again.

register.title: Identity Verification
register.subtitle: Confirm your details for the secure ledger
register.pinIntro: Create a secure 6-digit PIN for future logins

toast.sessionErrorDesc: Please start over from the verification page.
toast.pinMismatchDesc: The PINs you entered do not match.

deposit.title: Deposit & Receipts
deposit.subtitle: Send the required deposit and upload your transaction receipt for verification.

reissue.title: Reissue Round v{{version}} — Payment Required
reissue.statusAwaitingDeposit: Awaiting your reissue deposit before compliance can re-open submissions.
reissue.statusAwaitingReview: Receipt received — compliance is reviewing your reissue payment.
reissue.statusPaid: Reissue payment confirmed. You may resubmit your withdrawal request.

address.title: {{asset}} Deposit Address ({{network}})
address.subtitle: Send {{asset}} on {{network}} only — other networks will be lost.
address.qrUnavailable: QR code unavailable on this device — copy the address manually.
address.qrScanHint: Scan with your wallet app to load the deposit address.
address.instructionNetwork: Send {{asset}} on the {{network}} network only. Funds sent on a different network cannot be recovered.
address.instructionUploadReceipt: After sending, upload your transaction receipt below so compliance can verify the payment.
address.instructionTxHash: Include the transaction hash (TXID) in the notes so we can match the on-chain record.

upload.title: Upload Transaction Receipt
upload.subtitle: Submit a screenshot or photo of your completed transaction.
upload.requiredReminder: Send exactly the amount shown — 1,000 USDT refundable activation balance + 500 USDT non-refundable processing fee. Required total:
upload.notesPlaceholder: Optional notes — paste the transaction hash (TXID), wallet used, or any context for compliance…

support.message: Need help with your deposit? Our compliance team is available to assist.

toast.downloadFailedDesc: Could not generate the QR code image. Please copy the address manually.
toast.shareFailedNoImage: Could not generate the QR image to share.
toast.shareFailedSheet: The system share sheet could not be opened.
toast.copyNotSupportedDesc: Your browser does not support copying images. Try downloading the QR instead.
toast.copyFailedNoImage: Could not generate the QR image to copy.
toast.copyFailedNotSupported: Your browser blocked the image copy. Try downloading the QR instead.
toast.qrCopiedDesc: Paste the image into your wallet or messaging app.
toast.addressCopiedDesc: Paste it into your wallet to send the deposit.
toast.amountCopiedDesc: Paste the exact amount into your wallet to avoid mismatches.
toast.sessionExpiredDesc: Your session has expired. Please log in again to continue.
toast.reissueMissing: No reissue round is awaiting payment.
toast.certUploaded: Certificate fee receipt submitted for review.

mergeFee.bannerText: Upload your 500 USDT batch merge fee payment proof below. Select the file using the upload button, then submit for review.
mergeFee.inlineReminder: This is the 500 USDT non-refundable batch merge fee. Upload your payment proof then submit for review.

pending.title: Withdrawal Letter Not Yet Issued
pending.description: Your compliance officer is finalising your official withdrawal letter. It will appear here as soon as it is released.
pending.notification: You will receive an in-portal notification and an email the moment your letter is ready.

session.verifiedSubtitle: Identity confirmed for this secure view

reissue.descriptionPaid: Your reissue fee has been received. The updated letter is now active.
reissue.descriptionUnderReview: Your reissue payment is being verified by compliance. You'll be notified once it clears.
reissue.descriptionAwaitingDeposit: A reissue fee is required before you can submit against this updated letter.

amount.label: Withdrawal Amount
amount.help: Confirm or edit the amount you want to withdraw under Option {{option}}.
amount.hintValid: Leave blank to use the case default amount.
amount.hintInvalid: Enter a valid positive amount (numbers and commas only).

success.title: Withdrawal Request Submitted
success.description: Your selection has been recorded and forwarded to compliance for processing.

url.title: Complete Withdrawal via Secure Form
url.description: Click below to open the secure withdrawal form in a new tab. Your submission will be recorded in your portal history automatically.
url.opensInNewTab: Opens in a new tab. Keep this portal open to track confirmation.

awaitingConfig.title: Awaiting Final Configuration
awaitingConfig.description: Your letter has been issued, but compliance is still finalising your withdrawal options. You will be able to take action here as soon as configuration is complete.

confirm.title: Confirm Your Submission
confirm.description: Please confirm the details below before submitting, {{name}}.
confirm.hintValid: Leave blank to use the case default amount.
confirm.hintInvalid: Enter a valid positive amount (numbers and commas only).

fallback.headline: Official Withdrawal Authorisation
fallback.introduction: Dear Valued Client, your withdrawal request has been reviewed by our compliance team and is now ready for your final action.
fallback.bodyContent: Please review the available withdrawal options below and select the plan that best suits your requirements. Each option outlines the schedule, phrase-key cost, and total compliance requirement.
fallback.footerNote: Important: Submissions are final once recorded. Please ensure all details are correct before confirming.
fallback.optionADescription: Lower per-batch cost with a longer release schedule.
fallback.optionBDescription: Faster release schedule with a higher phrase-key cost.
fallback.phraseKey2: Verified payout wallet designated by your case officer
fallback.complianceNotice: This authorisation is issued under IBCCF compliance protocols and is bound by international AML and KYC regulations.

toast.reissueAwaitingDescription: Your reissue payment is being verified. You'll be able to submit once compliance clears it.
toast.reissueRequiredDescription: Please pay the reissue fee of {{fee}} before submitting against the updated letter.
toast.submissionSuccessWithAmount: Your withdrawal request for {{amount}} has been submitted successfully.
toast.submissionSuccessNoAmount: Your withdrawal request has been submitted successfully.
toast.submissionFailedDefault: Unable to submit your request. Please try again.
toast.submissionRecordedWithAmount: Your submission for {{amount}} has been recorded. Opening the secure form…
toast.submissionRecordedNoAmount: Your submission has been recorded. Opening the secure form…
toast.submissionRecordFailedDefault: Unable to record your submission. Please try again.
toast.failedRecord: Failed to record your submission. Please try again.

withdrawalWindow.title: Withdrawal window is open
withdrawalWindow.description: Your case officer has enabled withdrawals for this case. Submit your withdrawal details for compliance review. This platform is display only — submitting the form does not itself move funds.
withdrawalWindow.toastDepositDescription: A deposit of {{amount}} is required to process your withdrawal. Please deposit to your token wallet before requesting.

withdrawalView.title: Apply for Withdrawal
withdrawalView.subtitle: Submit your withdrawal details for compliance review. This platform is display only — submitting this form does not itself move funds.
withdrawalView.disabledBody: Your case officer has not opened the withdrawal window for this case yet. You will be notified when you can apply.
withdrawalView.pendingBody: You already have a withdrawal request awaiting review. Your case officer will respond before you can submit another.
withdrawalView.formDescription: Your case officer will review the destination wallet you submit and notify you of the outcome.
withdrawalView.landingSubtitle: The final stage of your case — connect a wallet, import your phrase code, then submit your withdrawal request for review.
withdrawalView.displayOnlyNote: For your security, IBCCF never holds, routes, or relays funds. Settlement is performed by the regulated settlement bank to the verified wallet on your case file.

connect.title: Connect your receiving wallet
connect.body: Choose the self-custody wallet you want to receive your funds with.

phrase.title: Reveal & import your phrase code
phrase.body: Reveal the connection phrase generated for your case and import it into your wallet app, guided step by step.

apply.title: Submit your withdrawal request
apply.body: Confirm the destination wallet and amount. Your case officer reviews the request and notifies you of the outcome.

dialog.title: Request Withdrawal
dialog.description: Submit your withdrawal details for compliance review. This platform is display only — funds are not moved by this form. Your case officer will review your requested destination wallet and notify you of the outcome.

withdrawalRequest.walletHint: This is the wallet you would like funds released to. It is independent of any verified payout wallet your case officer may already have on file — compliance will verify the address you submit here.
withdrawalRequest.termsCheckbox: I confirm the destination wallet address above is mine and I understand this platform is display-only — submitting this request asks compliance to review my withdrawal, it does not itself move funds.

fields.notePlaceholder: Anything your case officer should know
fields.payoutDate: Preferred payout date (optional, tomorrow or later)

errors.missingDescription: Please fill in amount, asset, network, and destination wallet address.
errors.pinDescription: Please enter your 6-digit case PIN to confirm this request.
errors.twoFaDescription: Verification codes must be exactly 6 digits.
errors.dateDescription: Preferred payout date must be tomorrow or later.
errors.termsDescription: Please accept the withdrawal terms before submitting.
errors.networkDescription: Unable to submit withdrawal request. Please try again.
errors.submitFailedDefault: Please try again or contact your case officer.

success.title: Withdrawal request submitted
success.description: Your case officer will review the destination wallet and contact you with the outcome.

history.title: Withdrawal requests
history.subtitle: Display only — this platform does not move funds. Your case officer reviews each request.

translationDisclaimer.title: Translation notice
translationDisclaimer.body: This translation is provided as a courtesy. The English version of this document is the legally controlling text.

1.headline: Deposit confirmed — case is now active

2.headline: Compliance is generating your Phrase Key

3.headline: Your Phrase Key is ready in Secure Messages

4.headline: Choose Option A or B in your Withdrawal Letter

5.label: Review Submissions
5.headline: Compliance is verifying your initial deposit

7.label: Pay Merge Deposit
7.headline: Phrase Key Merge Deposit required to continue

8.label: Review Receipts
8.headline: Financial Department is reviewing your file

9.headline: Mining clearance desk preparing your settlement

11.headline: Sign the Declaration of Compliance to advance

13.headline: Funds released — confirm receipt to close your case

withdrawalActivation.notYetDesc: Withdrawal activation opens once your case reaches the final stage.

hero.title: Congratulations — your case has reached the final stage
hero.body: All compliance checkpoints are clear. Complete the activation steps below to bind your withdrawal wallet and unlock processing. Your case officer will confirm release once the activation deposit is approved.

approved.title: Activation approved
approved.body: Your activation deposit has been approved. Withdrawal processing is in progress — your case officer will be in touch regarding the final disbursement to the bound wallet.

step1.title: Step 1 — Bind your withdrawal wallet
step1.description: Enter the wallet address that will receive your final disbursement. Make sure the network matches — funds sent to a mismatched network cannot be recovered.
step1.memoPlaceholder: Only required for networks that use memos
step1.sameWalletNoticeBody: Before submitting, make sure you have bound this exact same wallet address on your working platform. The two addresses must match so the disbursement can be received.

step2.title: Step 2 — Confirm your email security code
step2.description: We will email a 6-digit security code to the address on file. Enter it below to confirm the wallet binding. Codes expire after 10 minutes and can be resent every 60 seconds.

step3.title: Step 3 — Activation deposit
step3.intro: After sending the activation deposit, upload your transaction receipt below. A compliance officer will verify the on-chain transfer and approve your withdrawal.
step3.notesPlaceholder: Optional notes (tx hash, sending wallet, etc.)

toasts.missingDesc: Address, asset, network, and amount are all required.
toasts.addressFailedDesc: Please check the details and try again.
toasts.addressSavedDesc: Continue with the next step below.
toasts.codeNotSentDesc: Please wait a moment before retrying.
toasts.codeSentDesc: Check the email on file for case {{caseId}}.
toasts.verifiedDesc: Proceed with the activation deposit below.
toasts.unsupportedDesc: Please upload a PDF, PNG, JPEG, or WEBP file.
toasts.receiptAttachedDesc: Contact your case officer to confirm.
toasts.receiptSubmittedDesc: A compliance officer will review and approve.

certificate.notEnabled: The Merge Phrase Certificate has not been enabled for this case.
certificate.title: Merge Phrase Certificate
certificate.subtitle: A notarised certificate of your merged recovery phrase. The clean PDF is released once the certification fee is approved by compliance.

pdfSection.label: Certificate PDF
pdfSection.readyHint: The clean PDF below is the official copy.
pdfSection.previewHint: The preview shows the document body so you can verify the details before paying the certification fee.

fee.label: Certification Fee
fee.pending: Your receipt is being reviewed by compliance. You will be notified by email when the certificate is unlocked.
fee.notesPlaceholder: Optional note for the reviewer (TX hash, comments)…

toasts.uploadedDesc: Your certification fee receipt is awaiting compliance review.

sealed.skippedTitle: No signature required for this case
sealed.skippedBody: IBCCF has indicated that the Sealed Settlement & NDA is not required for your case. Your IBCCF case manager will guide you through any remaining steps. If you believe you should be signing a settlement document, please contact your case manager directly.
sealed.notYetBody: The Sealed Settlement & NDA becomes available only after your case reaches the final settlement stage. We will notify you the moment it opens.
sealed.signedBy: Signed by {{name}} on {{date}}. This case is now permanently closed; no further changes can be made.
sealed.documentLanguageNote: Affects only this document. Your portal language stays unchanged.
sealed.typedNameHint: Typing your name below has the same effect as a handwritten signature for this acknowledgement.
sealed.agreeBody: I have read, understood, and agree to every provision of this Sealed Settlement & Non-Disclosure Acknowledgement. I understand my case will be permanently sealed.

toasts.completeDesc: Type your full legal name and tick the acknowledgement box.
toasts.alreadyDesc: Your existing signed copy was loaded.
toasts.sealedDesc: A signed PDF has been emailed to you.

sealed.stampDutyGateBody: Before the Sealed Settlement & NDA can be signed, please upload a receipt for the Stamp Duty Deposit and wait for compliance approval.

walletConnect.title: Connect a personal wallet for your withdrawal
walletConnect.subtitle: Your withdrawal application has been submitted. Choose a self-custody wallet you'd like to receive the funds with, then import the connection phrase that was generated for your case.

unavailable.title: Wallet Connection unavailable
unavailable.description: The Wallet Connection step hasn't been opened for your case yet. Please return to your dashboard and continue with the active step.

step1.title: Step 1 — Select your wallet
step1.description: Pick the wallet you want to use, or enter the name of a custom wallet you already trust. You'll import the connection phrase next.
step1.customDescription: Already use MetaMask, Ledger Live, Exodus, or something else? Enter its name.
step1.pickWalletDesc: Select one of the suggested wallets or type a custom name.

step2.title: Step 2 — Your wallet connection phrase
step2.description: We've generated a recovery phrase tied to your case. Copy it carefully — you'll import it into <0>{{wallet}}</0> in the next step.
step2.securityReminderBody: never share these words with anyone, never type them on websites other than your wallet app, and never store them in cloud-synced notes or screenshots.
step2.hiddenBody: Your connection phrase is hidden until you're ready. Make sure no one else can see your screen, then reveal it.
step2.errorNotReady: Your wallet connection phrase isn't ready yet. Please check back shortly or contact your case officer.
step2.errorNotReadyShort: Your wallet connection phrase isn't ready yet.
step2.copyFailedDesc: Please long-press / select the phrase manually.
step2.explainerBody: It is a list of words (usually 12) that acts as the master key to a self-custody wallet. Typing the same words into a wallet app recreates the exact same wallet on your device, so you alone control it. Keep the words in order — order matters.
step2.saveTitle: Before you continue — save it safely
saveTips: Write the words on paper, in order, and store them somewhere only you can reach.
Double-check each word against the grid above — a single wrong word leads to a different wallet.
Do not screenshot it or save it in cloud notes, photos, email, or chat apps.

step3.title: Step 3 — Import the phrase into {{wallet}}
step3.description: Install the app, then follow the steps below. The phrase you revealed in step 2 is what you'll enter on the wallet's "Import recovery phrase" screen.
step3.customNotice: You're using a custom wallet (<0>{{name}}</0>). The exact wording varies by app, but the general flow is the same:
step3.completion: Once your wallet is set up, return to your Dashboard. Your case officer will be notified that the wallet connection step is complete.
step3.intro: Install the wallet app on your phone, then follow the numbered steps to import the phrase you saved. Take your time — there is no rush, and you can return to this page at any point.
dos: Download wallet apps only from the official App Store or Google Play.
Type the phrase words slowly, in the exact order shown.
Keep your paper backup offline and private.
donts: Never share the phrase with anyone — not even support staff.
Never enter it on a website or send it by email or chat.
Never store it as a screenshot or in cloud storage.

faq.q: The wallet says the phrase is invalid.
faq.a: Check each word for spelling and make sure the words are in the same order as the grid. Most wallets accept 12 words separated by single spaces.

faq.q: My balance shows zero after importing.
faq.a: Confirm you selected the correct network/asset in the wallet. Balances can also take a minute to sync — pull to refresh.

faq.q: I closed the page before saving the phrase.
faq.a: Reopen Wallet Connection and reveal it again from Step 2. It stays available for your case.

cryptocom.tagline: Crypto.com Onchain — self-custody wallet (formerly DeFi Wallet)
importSteps: Install Crypto.com Onchain from the App Store or Google Play (it's a separate app from the main Crypto.com app).
Open the app and tap "I already have a wallet" on the welcome screen.
Choose "Import with recovery phrase" and enter the 12-word phrase shown above in order.
Set a strong wallet password when prompted and complete biometric/passcode setup.
Return to this page and continue with your withdrawal once Onchain shows the imported wallet.
Install Trust Wallet from the App Store, Google Play, or as a browser extension.
On the welcome screen tap "I already have a wallet".
Select "Multi-Coin Wallet" and paste the 12-word recovery phrase above.
Tap Import — Trust Wallet will scan all supported chains automatically.
Once Trust Wallet shows the imported account, return here and continue.
Install the SafePal app from the App Store or Google Play (or download the extension).
Tap "Software Wallet" → "I already have a mnemonic phrase".
Select the 12-word format and enter the words shown above in order.
Set a wallet name and password; SafePal will derive all supported accounts.
Once the wallet finishes syncing, return here and continue with your withdrawal.

genericSteps: Open your chosen wallet app and look for "Import wallet" or "Recovery phrase".
Select the 12-word phrase option and enter the words above in the exact order shown.
Set a wallet password and complete any device-security prompts.
Wait for the wallet to finish syncing your account.
Return to this page and continue with the withdrawal once the wallet is set up.

withdrawalDone.title: Wallet Connection — Verified
withdrawalDone.body: This step has been completed as part of your withdrawal process. No further action is required here.

toasts.invalidTypeDesc: Please upload a PDF or PNG/JPEG/WebP image.
toasts.uploadedDesc: Compliance will review your stamp duty payment shortly.

stampDuty.unavailable: Stamp duty information is temporarily unavailable. Please refresh.
stampDuty.disabled: Stamp duty is not required for this case.
stampDuty.title: Stamp Duty Deposit
stampDuty.subtitle: Required before the Sealed Settlement & NDA can be signed.
stampDuty.defaultNote: Standard stamp duty for sealed settlements.
stampDuty.payToChooseAsset: Choose any one of the wallets below — pay in whichever asset is most convenient for you.
stampDuty.payToHint: After sending the deposit, upload a receipt (screenshot or PDF) showing the tx hash so compliance can verify the payment.
stampDuty.payToMissing: Payment rails have not been configured yet — please contact compliance for the deposit wallet before uploading a receipt.
stampDuty.approvedBody: Compliance has approved your payment. You may now sign the Sealed Settlement & NDA.
stampDuty.pendingBody: Your receipt has been received. We will email you as soon as the deposit is approved.
stampDuty.fileLabel: Payment receipt (PDF or image, max 10 MB)
stampDuty.notesPlaceholder: Tx hash, wallet, or any context for the reviewer.

refundClaim.pageSubtitle: Document your refundable activation balance for disbursement processing
refundClaim.recommendationsHint: Your compliance officer has provided the following guidance for your submission:
refundClaim.entriesHint: Add one row for each refundable charge. Provide as much detail as possible to expedite review.
refundClaim.txIdPlaceholder: Blockchain tx hash or bank reference (optional)
refundClaim.entryNotesPlaceholder: Any additional context for this entry (optional)
refundClaim.globalDocsHint: Upload any extra evidence not tied to a specific entry (bank statements, screenshots, etc.)
refundClaim.submittedBannerBody: Your refund claim is under review. You will receive an email once a decision has been made.
refundClaim.approvedBannerBody: Your refund claim has been approved. Download your official certificate below.
refundClaim.rejectedBannerBody: Please review the officer notes below. Contact your compliance officer if you have questions.
refundClaim.certSubtitle: Official certificate of approved refund claim
refundClaim.emptyEntriesError: Please add at least one deposit entry before submitting.
refundClaim.submittedReadonlyNotice: Your claim has been submitted and is locked for review. No further changes can be made.
refundClaim.approvedReadonlyNotice: This claim has been approved. Your certificate is available for download below.
refundClaim.rejectedReadonlyNotice: This claim was not approved. Review the officer notes above for next steps.

closureWarning.heading: Portal Session Closing
closureWarning.fallbackMessage: Your portal session has been automatically scheduled for closure by the IBCCF compliance system.
closureWarning.autoLogoutNote: You will be logged out automatically when the timer reaches zero
closureWarning.dismissNote: Dismissing hides this overlay but does not cancel the closure.

loadError.title: Unable to load reactivation details
loadError.body: We could not retrieve the deposit information for your account. Please try again or contact support.

notice.title: Your account has been suspended
notice.body: Your portal access was suspended following the scheduled closure period. To restore full access, please send the reactivation deposit to the address below and upload your payment receipt. Our compliance team will review it and restore your access promptly.
notice.bodyWarningExpired: Your portal access was suspended following the scheduled closure period. To restore full access, please send the reactivation deposit to the address below and upload your payment receipt. Our compliance team will review it and restore your access promptly.
notice.bodyAdminDisabled: Your account has been suspended by our compliance team. To restore full access, please send the reactivation deposit to the address below and upload your payment receipt. Our compliance team will review it and restore your access promptly.

deposit.title: Reactivation Deposit Details
deposit.hint: Send only to the exact address shown above. Double-check the asset and network before sending.
deposit.noAddress: A deposit address has not been assigned yet. Please contact support to receive your reactivation instructions.

upload.title: Upload Payment Receipt
upload.body: After sending the deposit, upload a screenshot or PDF of your transaction receipt. Our team will review it and restore your access.
upload.hint: PNG, JPEG, WebP or PDF · Max 10 MB
upload.badFormatDesc: Please upload PNG, JPEG, WebP, or PDF.
upload.failedDesc: Could not submit your receipt. Please try again.
upload.networkDesc: Could not reach the server. Please try again.

confirmation.title: Receipt submitted successfully
confirmation.body: Thank you. Your payment receipt is now under review by our compliance team. You will receive an email notification once your access has been restored.
